// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Topbar — search + user profile // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── export default function Topbar({ search, setSearch }) { return (
{/* Search */}
setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search alerts, IPs, rules..." style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: 420, background: "var(--bg)", border: "1px solid var(--border)", borderRadius: 6, padding: "7px 12px 7px 34px", color: "var(--text)", fontSize: 12, fontFamily: "var(--font-mono)", outline: "none", transition: "border-color 0.2s", }} onFocus={(e) => (e.target.style.borderColor = "var(--accent)")} onBlur={(e) => (e.target.style.borderColor = "var(--border)")} />
{/* Notification bell */} {/* Divider */}
{/* User profile */}
A. Rahman
SOC Analyst · Tier 2
AR
); }
